name: Ivanhoe Electric Inc.
description: Ivanhoe Electric Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on identifying and developing domestic sources of critical metals, primarily copper, gold, silver, and electric metals, essential for the energy transition in the United States. The company utilizes its proprietary Typhoon™ geophysical transmitter technology to detect deep-seated mineral deposits. Its key projects include the Santa Cruz Copper Project in Arizona and the Tintic Copper-Gold Project in Utah.
